calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
STEPHANIE MORRIS, RESPONDENT IN PRO PER
GHALEB FALAH, APPELLANT (NOT PRESENT)

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. MATTER CONTINUED FROM JULY 19, 2006 WITNESSES ARE SWORN.

DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY THE RESPONDENT STEPHANIE MORRIS MARKED AS
EXHIBIT 1- "1-PAGE RESCUE ROOTER WORK ESTIMATE".
PHOTOGRAPHS PRESENTED BUT NOT MARKED.
ABOVE EVIDENCES WAS RETURNED TO THE RESPONDENT IN OPEN COURT PER COURT ORDER.

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE COURT AWARDED THE MAXIMUM AMOUNT $7,500.00 PLUS $75.00 FOR COURT COSTS. TOTAL $ 7,575.00

JUDGE PRO TEM ROGER SLEIGHT, CLERKS RENE PASCUAL & M. JONES, NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Continued To Dec-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: RESPONDENT STEPHANIE MORRIS APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HER OWN BEHALF THIS DAY; APPELLANT MR. GHALEB FALAH APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HIS OWN BEHALF THIS DATE; THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY BY BOTH PARTIES. A PARTIAL SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARING IS HEARD; THEREUPON, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER CONTINUED UNTIL WEDNESDAY, DEC-20-2006, 9:00AM, IN DEPT. 525 FOR FURTHER HEARING; BOTH PARTIES RECEIVE ORAL NOTICE BY THE COURT IN OPEN COURT AS TO THE DAY, DATE, TIME AND LOCATION; PARTIES ARE TO NOTIFY THE COURT IF THERE IS A CHANGE IN CIRCUMSTANCES AND IF THEY WISH TO CANCEL THE CONTINUED HEARING ON DEC-20-06.

PRO TEM JUDGE ROGER W. SLIGHT; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).
